rule_text: This guide governs patient (DTC) materials. Language rules differ by audience: use 'someone/people with dermatomyositis' for patient materials; 'patients' is acceptable in HCP materials. Confirm audience in every brief before writing.
intent: Ensure patient-appropriate person-first language and audience confirmation before drafting.
summary: Use 'someone/people with dermatomyositis' in patient DTC materials; 'patients' only for HCP materials; always confirm audience in briefs before writing.
